message:
chore(beads): close br-r37-c1-b7huh (resistance_distance directed)

Fixed in commit 24fd6f8. resistance_distance now raises
NetworkXNotImplemented on DiGraph/MultiDiGraph matching nx's
@not_implemented_for('directed') decorator. This was the only
function in an audit of all 106 nx directed-decorated functions
with a parity gap.

Sweep: 6796 passed, 0 failed (+7 new regression tests).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
